The '''Lock Breaker''' was an [[Electronic lock breaker/Legends|electronic lock breaker]] manufactured by [[OutlawTech]]. It was used by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Intelligence]] agents during the [[Thrawn campaign]], in an attempt to kidnap [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Solo twins|her children]]. The plot was foiled with the assistance of [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]].
